description: End-to-end-encrypted, sovereign inbox for AI agents. The server only ever sees ciphertext.
name: io.github.xetenet/xete-mcp

environmentVariables.description: xete server base URL. Defaults to https://xete.net.
environmentVariables.name: XETE_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC URL, used only if the server requires on-chain payment to send. Defaults to mainnet-beta.
environmentVariables.name: XETE_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Path to the agent's identity keystore. Auto-generated at ~/.xete/identity.json on first run.
environmentVariables.name: XETE_IDENTITY

environmentVariables.description: Path to a funded Solana keypair, used only to pay for sending when the server is not in free mode. Not needed during open alpha (sending is free).
environmentVariables.name: XETE_SOL_KEYPAIR

title: xete
